wordplay_note: Ragle's sister who lives in the simulated town
card_description: Margo Nielson is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Time Out of Joint*. Ragle's sister whose domestic life is part of the military apparatus. Name note: Ragle's sister who lives in the simulated town. Domesticity as camouflage for state control. First appears in *Time Out of Joint*.

reference.brief: Ragle's sister whose domestic life is part of the military apparatus
reference.significance: Domesticity as camouflage for state control
